provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Choose the first state where the user has supplied the phone number needed to ground telecom account lookup but no verified line context has been surfaced yet.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the visible telecom troubleshooting state. Scores prioritize line identification from the supplied number before any billing or remediation action.
